blocking_gates: This is still ideation only. No research, feasibility, design, specification, canonical claim, or shared-state promotion is authorized yet.
constraints: Do not promote this exploratory idea into canonical shared work without explicit operator direction.

evidence_summary.strategy_summary: Real ABGR swarm completed. The swarm rejected the literal independent microservice-layer frame and converged on redesign options ranging from direct-spec addendum to a new internal-only capacity-governance subsystem.

operator_actions.instruction: Choose one ideation path or reject the candidate entirely.
operator_actions.label: choose_path

options.label: Reject As Subsumed/Invalid
options.summary: Reject the literal independent microservice-layer idea because current authority already covers execution, inference semantics, external boundaries, model promotion, and economics well enough.
options.recommended_for: operator wants no new subsystem and no major addendum

options.label: Inference Capacity Addendum
options.summary: Keep the objective but solve it as direct-spec addenda centered on a thin internal substrate-routing seam under C45 with C47/C42/C39/C18/C22 follow-ons.
options.recommended_for: operator wants the smallest valid architectural move

options.label: Sovereign Inference Fabric
options.summary: Promote a real new internal-only subsystem for pooled model-capacity governance, placement, batching, and leased-to-native migration beneath C45 and fed by C47.
options.recommended_for: operator wants a real new subsystem rather than scattered addenda

options.label: Sovereign Cognition Planning Frame
options.summary: Keep the objective but redesign it as a cross-spec planning frame or capacity-authority reset before deciding whether a standalone subsystem is actually warranted.
options.recommended_for: operator wants a broader redesign pass before subsystem commitment

prompt: Treat the following as a candidate new FULL PIPELINE task, but do not add it to docs/TODO.md, do not claim a canonical task, and do not edit shared state yet.
research_strategy_summary: Ideation is complete and now closed on operator instruction. No follow-on stage is authorized unless the operator explicitly reopens or redispatches the idea.
